creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
The usage is written in the Makefile as follows:

> Please add the following to your .weatherrc in order to use installed data files:
> 
> [default]
> setpath = /usr/local/share/weather

After that, you'll see:

> % weather --info raleigh
> Searching via name...
>
> Your search is ambiguous, returning 16 matches:
>    [fips1259475] Raleigh CDP, FL
>    [fips1716562601] Raleigh township, IL
>    [fips1762588] Raleigh village, IL
>    [fips2860840] Raleigh town, MS
>    [fips3718392612] Raleigh township, NC
>    [fips3755000] Raleigh city, NC
>    [fips3803765140] Raleigh township, ND
>    [fips3865100] Raleigh CDP, ND
>    [fips4160900] Raleigh Hills CDP, OR
>    [fips54081] Raleigh County, WV
>    [fips5466748] Raleigh CDP, WV
>    [kbkw] Raleigh County Mem Airport, WV, United States
>    [khsb] Harrisburg, Harrisburg-Raleigh Airport, IL, United States
>    [krdu] Raleigh-Durham International Airport, NC, United States
>    [wvz515] Northwest Raleigh County, WV, US
>    [wvz516] Southeast Raleigh County, WV, US

BTW, are you using pre-built packages rather than building from ports?
